Title: Agency data access not provisioned before day 1
Description: Teams lost most of day 1 waiting for read access to agency systems. This has now occurred at two consecutive events.
SuggestedAction: Add a T-7 data-access checklist to the event runbook; assign a data-readiness owner per agency.

Title: Demo WiFi saturated during judging
Description: Bandwidth collapsed when all teams streamed demos simultaneously.
SuggestedAction: Reserve a dedicated demo network segment; pre-cache demo assets locally.

Title: Allocate explicit capture time on day 2
Description: Use-case records were entered late because there was no scheduled time to capture them. Quality suffered.
SuggestedAction: Block 45 minutes on day 2 for teams to complete their use-case records in the library.

Title: Provide reusable starter kits before the event
Description: Teams that started from the RAG starter kit progressed noticeably faster.
SuggestedAction: Publish the top 3 patterns as starter kits in the library and link them in the event brief.

Title: Hybrid demo audio inconsistent for remote judges
Description: Remote judges struggled to hear in-person demos, affecting scoring fairness.
SuggestedAction: Use room mics and a dedicated AV owner for hybrid events; require a remote dry-run.
